race.comment: GOLDEN OCTAVIAN (2) has a solid record around this circuit with two wins and a second from just three spins and is building up a nice affinity with rider Wiggins. Should be right there when the judge calls a halt. COPPABELLA ROAD (6) boasts a win over this course and distance and will be rock-hard fit for this. Gets 2kg off with the claim and can make his presence felt. LOWLANDS (14) has hit the top-five in ten of her past 11 starts and is usually thereabouts. May run a race while fresh. THE IMPECKABLE (4) has placed two from three when first-up and maps nicely for this from gate two. In the mix. ELIE JOE (7) best of the rest.
